name: Quick Glazed Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs and 2/3 cup teriyaki baste & glaze in a large bowl; stir in bread cubes. Let stand 5 minutes, or until cubes are soft.
2. Mix in ground beef and pork, onion, and chili powder until well blended.
3. Press firmly into a 10-inch microwave-safe pie pan.
4. Microwave on High for 20 minutes; rotate the pan once.
5. Brush top of meat loaf with remaining teriyaki baste & glaze; microwave on High for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
